debug_info.goal:
S : Type u_1
n : ℕ
i : Fin n
f : Fin n → RelIO S
⊢ PortMap.getIO (@Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelIO.liftFinf (RelIO S) n f) { inst := InstIdent.top, name := ↑i } = f i

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simp only [List.toList_toAssocList, AssocList.getIO_eq_getD]
    induction fin_range n with
    | nil => simp at h
    | cons hd tl ih =>
      simp at h
      cases h with
      | inl heq =>
        subst heq
        simp [AssocList.getD]
      | inr hmem =>
        simp [AssocList.getD]
        split
        · rfl
        · exact ih hmem
